features: BIN FRESHNESS THAT LASTS – No one wants to be greeted by unpleasant bin smells. Jeyes Freshbin Powder keeps your home or workplace smelling fresher for longer. Just a sprinkle absorbs odours and leaves your bins smelling clean

COOL LINEN SCENT – Inspired by the crisp scent of freshly washed laundry, Jeyes dustbin powder infuses your indoor and outdoor bins with an uplifting fragrance that lingers long after the first sprinkle

ABSORBS MOISTURE & FLUID LEAKS – Bin bags can leak, and damp conditions only make odours worse. This bin deodoriser and freshener absorbs excess moisture in bin bags and wheelie bins, helping to prevent bad smells and messy clean-ups

FAST-ACTING & LONG-LASTING – A quick sprinkle is all it takes for instant freshness that lasts. Simply add it to the base of your kitchen bin or wheelie bin, over bin bags, or directly onto waste to neutralise odours with a cool linen scent

THE ORIGINAL OUTDOOR CLEANER – Jeyes has been keeping outdoor spaces clean and protected since 1877. Trusted by generations, with over 145 years' expertise, our products fight dirt, stains, bacteria and germs to make outdoor cleaning easier than ever

Jeyes Fluid Cleaners Merchant video British cleaning heritage since 1877 Jeyes Jeyes is one of the UK’s longest-standing outdoor cleaning brands, trusted for powerful products that deliver. From the iconic Classic Formula to advanced sprays, BBQ cleaners, drain unblockers and hose-on or pro solutions, Jeyes cuts through grease, dirt and bacteria fast. Proven formulas, simple instructions and formats for every job make it easy to achieve a cleaner, safer garden. Previous page Heavy-duty cleaner for powerful grime removal Removes dirt, grime and stains, while the phenolic aroma leaves your space feeling fresh Multi-purpose cleaner for fast, hygienic results This concentrated disinfectant protects your family and tackles grime for a hygienic outdoor clean 4-in-1 complete clean for patios & decking Lift away layers of sludge and slime to reveal the true beauty of your patios and decking Clean & restore brightness to weathered UPVC More than just another UPVC product, it's ideal for doors, cladding, fascias and garden furniture Cut through burnt-on food with ease Get back to cooking on a fresh, hygienic grill every time Next page 1 Classic Formula 2 Outdoor Cleaner 3 Patio, Decking & Driveway 4 UPVC 5 BBQ Cleaner Previous page Results that matter Jeyes offers fast, visible cleaning that kills 99.9% of bacteria (where stated), in formats for every job from sprays to soakers. Trusted by millions of households for tough cleaning tasks. Modern solutions, backed by experience Today’s range is built for real outdoor cleaning - cutting through grease, dirt and bacteria, fast. With simple instructions, proven formulas and formats to suit any job. Trusted performance Our Classic Formula has been used for generations, and we’ve since expanded to include advanced sprays, specialist BBQ cleaners, drain unblockers, and innovative hose-on and pro formats Next page What is Jeyes Fluid used for? Jeyes Fluid is a powerful outdoor cleaner and disinfectant, ideal for cleaning patios, driveways, drains, greenhouses, garden furniture, animal housing, and more. Can I use Jeyes Fluid indoors? No, Jeyes Fluid is designed for outdoor use only. It should not be used inside the home due to its strong formula. Is Jeyes Fluid safe to use around children and pets? Yes, but only after the treated area has dried completely. Keep pets and animals away while applying the product and until the surface is fully dry. Can I use Jeyes Fluid to clean a greenhouse? Yes! It’s perfect for disinfecting greenhouses. Dilute according to instructions, apply to surfaces, and rinse thoroughly. How do I dilute Jeyes Fluid? Dilution rates vary based on the task. Always refer to the label for recommended dilution ratios depending on the surface or cleaning job.
